name: Trout vs Islanders
description: The crown jewel of Rivalry Week: the league philanthropists and the men who want them destroyed.

name: Mounties vs Wranglers
description: No love lost between western Canada rivals, and no imminent signs of making up.

name: Railfans vs Hogs
description: Ownership shared a graduate school campus, but never shared so much as a lunch.

name: Stars vs Lasercats
description: The Lasercats' chance to prove they're more than just Bikini Bottom's farm system.

name: Mastodons vs Benders
description: Between two tortured franchises, it's a war of attrition — and insulin.

name: Blowers vs Mustangs
description: Two SCC welterweights who are desparate for glory.

name: Sharks vs SeaSnakes
description: Rivals on the gridiron, both in the AFC North and the SCC.
